do you now, or will you in the future, require immigration sponsorship? in other words, are you currently on f-1 opt, stem opt, h-1b, e-3, tn, h-4 ead or other time-limited u.s. work authorization?

reasons: field count delta 3 exceeds tolerance 2 (detector=11, ai=8)

ai.notes: The form includes a LinkedIn integration for auto-filling data. The phone input uses a country-code selector widget. Some fields like resume upload or additional text areas may be dynamically loaded or hidden behind the LinkedIn authentication flow.
